Preterit.turoyo: mqamalli u=laḥmo 244; mqamalli aq=qayse 244; JS: Kətwolxu mede, d mašḥənitu ruḥayxu? Ǧule šaḥine kətwolxu? — XB: Naqqa səmwolan nuro w kətlan xandaq kḥəfrina. Səmlan nuro bu xandaq, mqamarlan, kətwolan fako d laḥmo ṣafro
translations:
ich
			habe das Holz auf dem Ofen getrocknet

JS: Did you have anything to warm yourself? Warm clothes? — XB:
			Sometimes we made ourselves a fire, and we had a <...> that
			we dug out. We made ourselves a fire and roasted... we had a bit
			of morning-bread
